normalization: MetricsKind::Perf rows normalized into canonical endpoint rows; no `perf!` checkpoints were observed in the current repo scan.
freshness_rule: One fresh `setup_root()` topology per measured scenario; baseline and post-call perf tables sampled inside that isolated topology.
checkpoint_rule: Checkpoint deltas are unavailable until real `perf!` call sites exist; flows are reported as coverage gaps rather than inferred.
